'''Qiaxx''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cor'ric sector/Legends|Cor'ric sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
[[File:Mara_on_the_run.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] on Qiaxx.]]

Qiaxx was the base of operations for [[Dequc]]'s [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] splinter group [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]]. It was the site of an elaborate [[Casino/Legends|casino]]—owned by [[Dequc]] via intermediaries—and the famous [[Bubble Cliffs]] of [[Nezmi]].

[[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in order to [[Mission to Qiaxx|eliminate]] Dequc several months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
